title: solenanthus hirsutus
intro: Solenanthus hirsutus, also known as the hairy horned-poppy or hairy solenanthus, is a perennial plant species in the family Boraginaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Solenanthus hirsutus include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and its dried roots are used in herbal preparations for medicinal purposes.
